concepts.title: Kuru Prion Epidemic and Genetic Selection
concepts.description: Prion disease spread through cannibalism in Papua New Guinea; genetic resistance selection (PRNP gene); evolutionary selection through epidemic

concepts.title: G6PD Deficiency as Antimalarial Adaptation
concepts.description: G6PD deficiency provides malaria resistance; evolutionary trade-off: protection against malaria at cost of hemolytic anemia; population-level selection

concepts.title: Aboriginal Pituri and Nicotiana Alkaloids
concepts.description: Pituri plant used by Aboriginal peoples for stimulant and appetite suppression; botanical knowledge of alkaloid properties; pre-colonial pharmacology

concepts.title: Quinine as Antimalarial and Drug Discovery
concepts.description: Quinine isolation from cinchona bark; antimalarial mechanism; historical drug discovery from traditional medicine; pharmacological efficacy

concepts.title: Epigenetic Inheritance and Trauma
concepts.description: Epigenetic changes (DNA methylation, histone modification) induced by trauma; transgenerational inheritance; environmental influence on gene expression without DNA sequence change

concepts.title: Vernix Caseosa and Fetal Lipid Development
concepts.description: Vernix caseosa as fetal protective coating; lipid composition; developmental protection function; evolutionary significance

concepts.title: Sleep Paralysis and Supernatural Encounter
concepts.description: Sleep paralysis neurobiological mechanism (REM atonia, hypnagogic hallucination, fear response); cultural interpretation as supernatural encounter (incubus, popobawa, old hag); bridge between neurobiology and cultural meaning-making

concepts.title: Paranthropus and Oldowan Tool Use
concepts.description: Paranthropus (robust australopithecine) hand morphology and tool-use capacity; behavioral plasticity; relationship between hand morphology and cognitive capability

concepts.title: Bacterial Antibiotic Resistance
concepts.description: [Placeholder: Evolution of antibiotic resistance in bacterial populations through selective pressure]

concepts.title: Viral Mutation and Pandemic Emergence
concepts.description: [Placeholder: Mutation rates in RNA viruses and emergence of pandemic-capable variants]

concepts.title: Metabolic Rate and Body Size Scaling
concepts.description: [Placeholder: Allometric relationships between metabolic rate and body size across species]
